share-popup.title: 🗣️ Share the quiz!

lisbon.name: Lisbon
lisbon.title: Lisbon, the city with Atlantic colors
lisbon.description: Let yourself be charmed by Lisbon, a city both historic and modern, where cobbled streets meet trendy neighborhoods and miradouros offer breathtaking views of the Atlantic Ocean. Discover our personalized guide that reveals the must-see places, our culinary recommendations, and practical information to prepare for your ideal summer!

to-know.language: Portuguese but English is widely understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 28°C, with sunny days and pleasantly cool evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (2€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

paris.name: Paris
paris.title: Paris, the city of light and romance
paris.description: Immerse yourself in the magic of Paris, where history meets modernity, and every street corner tells a story. From the iconic Eiffel Tower to charming Montmartre, discover our curated guide featuring must-see attractions, culinary delights, and essential tips for your perfect Parisian adventure!

to-know.language: French but English is widely spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C, with occasional rain showers
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / RER (1.90€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

madrid.name: Madrid
madrid.title: Madrid, the vibrant heart of Spain
madrid.description: Explore Madrid, the Spanish capital, where art, culture and gastronomy meet in a warm and dynamic atmosphere. Stroll through its lively streets, discover its world-renowned museums and taste tapas in traditional bars. Our guide offers a selection of must-see places, culinary specialties to savor, and practical advice for a memorable stay.

to-know.language: Spanish, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C in summer, with sunny days and warm evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Train (1.50€ to 2€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

tokyo.name: Tokyo
tokyo.title: Tokyo, the futuristic and traditional Japanese metropolis
tokyo.description: Discover Tokyo, a city where modernity and tradition harmoniously coexist. From glittering skyscrapers to ancient temples, Tokyo offers a unique experience around every corner. Immerse yourself in the bustle of its vibrant districts, savor authentic Japanese cuisine, and explore the iconic places that make Tokyo an unmissable destination.

to-know.language: Japanese, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and humid days
to-know.transport: Metro / Train / Bus (around 200¥ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, but carry cash for small businesses
tips.water: Drinkable from tap, but often filtered

rome.name: Rome
rome.title: Rome, the eternal city
rome.description: Step into the heart of ancient history and modern Italian culture in Rome. From the majestic Colosseum to the Vatican City, discover our comprehensive guide featuring iconic landmarks, authentic cuisine, and essential tips for your unforgettable Roman holiday!

to-know.language: Italian, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (1.50€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

milan.name: Milan
milan.title: Milan, the capital of fashion and design
milan.description: Discover Milan, a city where elegance and innovation meet. Known as the fashion capital, Milan is also rich in history and culture. Explore its iconic monuments, stroll through its trendy neighborhoods, and savor Milanese cuisine in traditional trattorias. Our guide offers a selection of must-see places, culinary specialties to taste, and practical advice for an unforgettable stay.

top-places.name: The Last Supper - Santa Maria delle Grazie Church

to-know.language: Italian, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and sunny days
to-know.airport: Malpensa, Linate and Orio al Serio
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus (1.50€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

new-york.name: New York
new-york.title: New York, the city that never sleeps
new-york.description: Discover New York, a vibrant and cosmopolitan metropolis where each neighborhood offers a unique experience. From the iconic Statue of Liberty to the dazzling lights of Times Square, New York is a city of contrasts and energy. Explore its parks, world-renowned museums, and savor New York cuisine in its numerous restaurants and food trucks.

to-know.language: English, with many other languages spoken in the multicultural neighborhoods
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and humid days
to-know.airport: John F. Kennedy, LaGuardia and Newark
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi ($2.75 per metro ride)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for tips

amsterdam.name: Amsterdam
amsterdam.title: Amsterdam, the city of canals and culture
amsterdam.description: Experience the unique charm of Amsterdam, where historic canals meet modern culture. From world-class museums to cozy cafés, discover our comprehensive guide featuring must-see attractions, local delicacies, and essential tips for your perfect Dutch adventure!

to-know.language: Dutch but English is widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, with cloudy days
to-know.transport: Tram / Metro / Bus / Bike (3.20€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

sydney.name: Sydney
sydney.title: Sydney, the pearl of Australia
sydney.description: Discover Sydney, a dynamic and cosmopolitan city where nature and urban development meet harmoniously. From the iconic Sydney Opera House to the golden sand beaches of Bondi, Sydney offers a multitude of activities for all tastes. Explore its lush botanical gardens, historic neighborhoods, and savor Australian cuisine in its many restaurants and cafes.

top-places.name: Bondi Beach & Bondi to Coogee Walk

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 18°C and 26°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Train / Bus / Ferry (Opal card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

singapore.name: Singapore
singapore.title: Singapore, the futuristic garden city
singapore.description: Discover Singapore, a city-state where modernity meets lush vegetation. Known for its iconic skyscrapers and spectacular gardens, Singapore is a must-visit destination for culture, shopping, and gastronomy enthusiasts. Explore its multicultural neighborhoods, savor unique local dishes, and admire panoramic views from its many observation points.

to-know.language: English, Malay, Mandarin and Tamil
to-know.weather: Equatorial climate with temperatures between 25°C and 31°C year-round
to-know.transport: MRT / Bus / Taxi (EZ-Link card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

barcelona.name: Barcelona
barcelona.title: Barcelona, where Gaudí meets the Mediterranean
barcelona.description: Experience the vibrant energy of Barcelona, a city where modernist architecture meets Mediterranean charm. From Gaudí's masterpieces to the bustling La Rambla, discover our comprehensive guide featuring iconic landmarks, delicious tapas, and essential tips for your perfect Catalan adventure!

to-know.language: Catalan and Spanish, but English is widely spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (2.40€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash for small purchases

taipei.name: Taipei
taipei.title: Taipei, the city of thousand flavors and landscapes
taipei.description: Discover Taipei, the dynamic capital of Taiwan, where modernity meets tradition. From iconic skyscrapers like Taipei 101 to lively night markets, Taipei offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its historic temples, lush national parks, and savor Taiwanese cuisine that's renowned throughout the world.

to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and humid days
to-know.transport: MRT / Bus / Taxi (EasyCard recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small businesses
tips.water: Drinkable from tap, but often filtered

seoul.name: Seoul
seoul.title: Seoul, the vibrant metropolis of South Korea
seoul.description: Discover Seoul, a city where tradition meets modernity. From royal palaces to futuristic skyscrapers, Seoul offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its lively neighborhoods, savor authentic Korean cuisine, and immerse yourself in the dynamic culture of this Asian capital.

to-know.language: Korean, but English is often understood in tourist areas

london.name: London
london.title: London, a cosmopolitan and historic city
london.description: Explore London, a city where royal history meets vibrant modernity. From iconic landmarks like Buckingham Palace and the Tower of London to the lively neighborhoods of Covent Garden, London offers a unique experience to every visitor. Discover its world-renowned museums, enjoy traditional British cuisine, and experience the dynamic atmosphere of this international metropolis.

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, with often cloudy days
to-know.airport: Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and London City

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, keep some cash for small purchases

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.title: Dubai, the city of extravagance and innovation
dubai.description: Discover Dubai, a futuristic metropolis where bold architecture meets luxury and innovation. From iconic skyscrapers like the Burj Khalifa to the artificial islands of Palm Jumeirah, Dubai is a destination that never ceases to amaze. Explore its gigantic shopping malls, sunny beaches, and savor local cuisine in its numerous restaurants.

to-know.language: Arabic, but English is widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 40°C in summer, with very hot and sunny days
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi (Nol card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

berlin.name: Berlin
berlin.title: Berlin, where history meets creativity
berlin.description: Discover Berlin, a city that perfectly blends its rich history with a vibrant contemporary culture. From the iconic Brandenburg Gate to the trendy neighborhoods of Kreuzberg, explore our comprehensive guide featuring must-see landmarks, local cuisine, and essential tips for your perfect Berlin experience!

to-know.language: German, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (2.90€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, cash preferred in some places

osaka.name: Osaka
osaka.title: Osaka, street food and Japan's urban energy
osaka.description: Discover Osaka, a dynamic and welcoming city, known for its delicious street food and lively atmosphere. From historic monuments like Osaka Castle to the vibrant neighborhoods of Dotonbori, Osaka offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its modern attractions, savor local culinary specialties, and immerse yourself in authentic Japanese culture.

to-know.language: Japanese, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with hot and humid days
to-know.transport: Metro / Train / Bus (around 200¥ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small businesses

bangkok.name: Bangkok
bangkok.title: Bangkok, the city of angels and golden temples
bangkok.description: Discover Bangkok, a vibrant city where tradition meets modernity. From majestic temples like the Grand Palace and Wat Phra Kaew to the bustling markets of Khao San Road, Bangkok offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its floating markets, savor authentic Thai cuisine, and immerse yourself in the energy of this Asian metropolis.

top-places.name: The Grand Palace & Wat Phra Kaew

to-know.language: Thai, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C, with hot and humid days
to-know.transport: Skytrain (BTS) / Metro (MRT) / Bus / Tuk-tuk

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in major stores, carry cash for small purchases

los-angeles.name: Los Angeles
los-angeles.title: Los Angeles, the city of angels and cinema
los-angeles.description: Discover Los Angeles, a city where Hollywood glamour meets the sunny beaches of California. From icons like the Hollywood Sign and the Walk of Fame to modern attractions like Universal Studios, L.A. offers an unforgettable experience. Explore its diverse neighborhoods, savor local cuisine, and enjoy the relaxed atmosphere of the West Coast.

to-know.language: English, with a strong presence of Spanish
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C, with sunny days all year round
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Car (recommended for easy travel)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for tips

istanbul.name: Istanbul
istanbul.title: Istanbul, the city of a thousand and one wonders
istanbul.description: Discover Istanbul, a city where East meets West. From historic monuments like Hagia Sophia and the Blue Mosque to the bustling markets of the Grand Bazaar, Istanbul offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its majestic palaces, savor authentic Turkish cuisine, and enjoy a cruise on the Bosphorus to admire the city from another angle.

to-know.language: Turkish, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with sunny days and pleasant evenings
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus / Ferry (Istanbulkart recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small businesses

melbourne.name: Melbourne
melbourne.title: Melbourne, the cultural capital of Australia
melbourne.description: Discover Melbourne, a dynamic and cosmopolitan city, known for its flourishing arts scene and diverse cuisine. From architectural icons like Federation Square to the sunny beaches of St Kilda, Melbourne offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its vibrant markets, lush gardens, and savor a Flat White coffee in one of its many trendy cafes.

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, with sunny days and mild nights
to-know.transport: Tram / Train / Bus (Myki card recommended for transportation)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

hong-kong.name: Hong Kong
hong-kong.title: Hong Kong, the Pearl of the Orient
hong-kong.description: Discover Hong Kong, where East meets West in a unique blend of modern skyscrapers and ancient traditions. From the panoramic views at Victoria Peak to the bustling markets of Mong Kok, Hong Kong is a vibrant and dynamic destination. Explore its historic temples, hop on a Star Ferry cruise, and enjoy authentic Cantonese cuisine.

to-know.language: Cantonese and English
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C, with hot and humid summers
to-know.transport: MTR / Bus / Tram / Ferry (Octopus card recommended for transport)

tips.payment: Cards accepted everywhere, but carry cash for small purchases

munich.name: Munich
munich.title: Munich, Bavaria's capital of culture and beer
munich.description: Discover Munich, a city where Bavarian heritage meets modern living. From lively squares like Marienplatz to the wide green spaces of the Englischer Garten, Munich offers a unique experience for every visitor. Explore its majestic castles, world-renowned museums, and enjoy traditional Bavarian cuisine in its iconic beer halls.

to-know.language: German, though English is commonly understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, with sunny days and cool evenings
to-know.transport: Subway / Tram / Bus (€2.90 per ride)

tips.payment: Cards accepted everywhere, but carry cash for small purchases
tips.water: Tap water is safe to drink

las-vegas.name: Las Vegas
las-vegas.title: Las Vegas, the city of entertainment and extravagance
las-vegas.description: Discover Las Vegas, where glamour and entertainment meet in the heart of the Nevada desert. From the dazzling lights of the Strip to breathtaking shows, Las Vegas offers an unforgettable experience for every visitor. Explore iconic casinos, feast at all-you-can-eat buffets, and set off on an adventure to the Grand Canyon or Death Valley.

top-places.name: Grand Canyon or Death Valley Excursion

dishes.name: All-You-Can-Eat Buffet (The Buffet at Wynn, Bacchanal at Caesars, etc.)

to-know.language: English
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 40°C, with hot, sunny days
to-know.transport: Taxi / Bus / Monorail (Uber and Lyft available)

tips.payment: Cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for tips

florence.name: Florence
florence.title: Florence, the cradle of the Renaissance
florence.description: Discover Florence, a city steeped in art and history, where every corner tells a story. From architectural masterpieces like the Duomo and Giotto’s Campanile to the artistic treasures of the Uffizi Gallery, Florence is truly an open-air museum. Stroll along the Ponte Vecchio, wander through the Boboli Gardens, and savor Tuscan cuisine in traditional trattorias.

to-know.language: Italian, though English is commonly understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 30°C, with hot summers and mild winters
to-know.transport: Tram / Bus / On foot (the city is very walkable)

tips.payment: Cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases
tips.water: Tap water is safe to drink

prague.name: Prague
prague.title: Prague, the city of a thousand spires and legends
prague.description: Discover Prague, the magical capital of the Czech Republic, known for its medieval architecture and charming cobbled streets. From the majestic Prague Castle to the iconic Charles Bridge, every corner of the city tells a story. Explore Old Town Square with its Astronomical Clock, wander through the Jewish Quarter, and enjoy traditional Czech cuisine in one of its many restaurants.

to-know.language: Czech, but English is commonly understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 30°C in summer, with pleasant days and cool evenings
to-know.transport: Tram / Metro / Bus (valid 90-minute ticket for approx. 32 CZK)

tips.payment: Cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small purchases
tips.water: Tap water is safe to drink

dublin.name: Dublin
dublin.title: Dublin, the vibrant capital of Ireland
dublin.description: Discover Dublin, a city rich in history and culture, where Irish tradition meets a modern and dynamic atmosphere. From iconic institutions like Trinity College and St. Patrick's Cathedral to the lively pubs of Temple Bar, Dublin offers a unique experience to every visitor. Explore its castles, savor local cuisine, and enjoy a pint of Guinness in one of its famous pubs.

to-know.language: Irish and English
to-know.weather: Between 5°C and 20°C, with often cloudy and rainy days
to-know.transport: Bus / Tram (Luas) / Taxi (public transport is well developed)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

kyoto.name: Kyoto
kyoto.title: Kyoto, the city of temples and tradition
kyoto.description: Discover Kyoto, the ancient capital of Japan, famous for its historic temples, zen gardens, and traditional culture. From iconic sites like Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion) and Fushimi Inari Taisha to the picturesque streets of Gion, Kyoto offers an unforgettable experience. Explore its bamboo forests, savor kaiseki cuisine, and be enchanted by the serene atmosphere of this unique city.

to-know.language: Japanese, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 10°C and 30°C, with hot summers and cool winters
to-know.transport: Metro / Train / Bus (around 200¥ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small businesses

vienna.name: Vienna
vienna.title: Vienna, the city of music and history
vienna.description: Discover Vienna, the Austrian capital renowned for its rich cultural heritage and romantic atmosphere. From majestic palaces like Schönbrunn to the stunning St. Stephen’s Cathedral, Vienna is a true European gem. Explore world-famous museums, attend an opera performance, and savor delicious Viennese cuisine in its historic cafés.

to-know.language: German, though English is commonly understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 5°C and 25°C, with warm summers and cold winters
to-know.transport: Subway / Tram / Bus (90-minute ticket for approx. €2.40)

tips.payment: Cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases
tips.water: Tap water is safe to drink

venice.name: Venice
venice.title: Venice, the city of canals and gondolas
venice.description: Discover Venice, a unique city built on water, famous for its romantic canals, historic bridges, and breathtaking architecture. From the majestic St. Mark's Square to the beautiful Doge's Palace, every corner of Venice is a true masterpiece. Enjoy a gondola ride, explore the island of Murano, and savor the delicious Venetian cuisine.

to-know.language: Italian, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 10°C and 30°C, with hot summers and cool winters
to-know.transport: Vaporetto (water bus) / On foot (the city is easily walkable)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

kuala-lumpur.name: Kuala Lumpur
kuala-lumpur.title: Kuala Lumpur, the dynamic capital of Malaysia
kuala-lumpur.description: Discover Kuala Lumpur, a modern and cosmopolitan city, famous for its iconic skyscrapers and diverse culture. From the Petronas Twin Towers to the Batu Caves, Kuala Lumpur offers a unique experience blending tradition and modernity. Explore its museums, lush parks, and savor delicious Malaysian cuisine in its numerous restaurants and markets.

to-know.language: Malay, but English is widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C, with a humid tropical climate
to-know.transport: Monorail / Bus / Taxi (Grab is popular for rides)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small purchases

athens.name: Athens
athens.title: Athens, the city of gods and history
athens.description: Discover Athens, the capital of Greece and the cradle of Western civilization. From iconic monuments like the Acropolis and the Parthenon to the charming streets of Plaka, Athens is a city where history and culture meet. Explore its fascinating museums, savor delicious Greek cuisine, and immerse yourself in the vibrant atmosphere of this historic metropolis.

to-know.language: Greek, but English is often understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 10°C and 35°C, with hot summers and mild winters
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram (transportation ticket valid for 90 minutes at around 1.40€)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most places, carry cash for small purchases

toronto.name: Toronto
toronto.title: Toronto, the dynamic Canadian metropolis
toronto.description: Discover Toronto, Canada's largest city, known for its cultural diversity, iconic skyscrapers, and vibrant atmosphere. From the famous CN Tower to the Toronto Islands, this city offers a multitude of activities and sites to explore. Enjoy its lively markets, historic neighborhoods, and savor delicious local cuisine in its numerous restaurants.

to-know.language: English and French
to-know.weather: Between -5°C and 30°C, with cold winters and hot summers
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus (TTC)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for small purchases

miami.name: Miami
miami.title: Miami, the sunny and vibrant city
miami.description: Discover Miami, a dynamic city known for its sunny beaches, diverse culture, and festive atmosphere. From iconic neighborhoods like South Beach and Little Havana to the colorful artworks of Wynwood Walls, Miami offers a unique experience. Enjoy its museums, lush gardens, and savor the delicious local cuisine in its numerous restaurants and markets.

to-know.language: English, but Spanish is also widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 35°C, with hot and sunny days
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi (Uber and Lyft available)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, carry cash for tips

san-francisco.name: San Francisco
san-francisco.title: San Francisco, the city of hills and bohemian spirit
san-francisco.description: Head to San Francisco, the jewel of the American West Coast! With its iconic cable cars, colorful neighborhoods, and spectacular views of the Pacific, the city enchants travelers looking for originality. Follow our guide to discover the must-see spots, local foodie favorites, and practical tips to explore this legendary city with ease.

dishes.name: Clam Chowder in a Sourdough Bread Bowl

to-know.language: English, but French is sometimes understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 22°C in summer, with frequent morning fog and sunny afternoons
to-know.transport: Historic cable cars / BART metro / Buses (MUNI Pass recommended)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, bring some cash for small vendors

copenhagen.name: Copenhagen
copenhagen.title: Copenhagen, the Scandinavian pearl with unique charm
copenhagen.description: Discover Copenhagen, a capital where Scandinavian modernity harmonizes perfectly with history. Between picturesque canals, avant-garde design and hygge atmosphere, let yourself be seduced by this human-scale city. Our guide offers you the must-see sites, culinary specialties and all the practical information to fully enjoy your stay in the Danish capital.

to-know.language: Danish but English is fluently spoken by almost all residents
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 22°C in summer, often windy with possible showers
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Train (24-36 DKK per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, contactless payment very common

zurich.name: Zurich
zurich.title: Zurich, Swiss elegance between lake and mountains
zurich.description: Discover Zurich, a Swiss jewel where Helvetic precision meets exceptional quality of life. Between its crystal-clear lake, historic streets and dynamic cultural scene, this cosmopolitan city will seduce you with its perfect balance of nature and urbanism. Our guide reveals the must-see places, culinary delights and all the practical advice to fully enjoy your stay.

to-know.language: German (Swiss-German), French and English widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 18°C and 25°C in summer, temperate climate with possible showers
to-know.transport: Tram / Bus / Train (3-5 CHF per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted almost everywhere, keep cash for small businesses

pattaya.name: Pattaya
pattaya.title: Pattaya, tropical gem between parties and traditions
pattaya.description: Explore Pattaya, this fascinating Thai seaside resort where nightlife excitement meets spirituality and natural beauty. Between fine sandy beaches, majestic temples and urban entertainment, discover a destination with multiple facets. Our guide reveals the iconic sites, culinary delights and all the essential information to fully enjoy this pearl of the Gulf of Thailand.

dishes.name: Som Tum - Spicy green papaya salad
Mango Sticky Rice - Sweet coconut rice with fresh mango

to-know.language: Thai, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 27°C and 35°C year-round, tropical climate with rainy season (May-October)
to-know.transport: Songthaew / Motorbike taxi / Baht Bus (10-50 THB per trip)

tips.payment: Cash preferred, credit cards accepted in larger establishments
tips.meal-hours: Restaurants serve all day, many street food available 24/7

stockholm.name: Stockholm
stockholm.title: Stockholm, the elegant Nordic capital on water
stockholm.description: Discover Stockholm, a royal city built on 14 islands, where Scandinavian modernity meets medieval history in an exceptional natural setting. Between its cobbled streets, innovative museums and picturesque archipelago, the Swedish capital offers a unique urban experience combining design, culture and proximity to nature. Our guide reveals the iconic places, culinary delights and practical tips to fully enjoy your stay in this pearl of the Baltic.

to-know.language: Swedish but English is fluently spoken by almost all residents
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 23°C in summer, temperate Nordic climate with bright nights
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram / Ferry (38 SEK per trip)

tips.payment: Electronic payments preferred, almost cashless society

mexico-city.name: Mexico City
mexico-city.title: Mexico City, cultural megacity of a thousand contrasts
mexico-city.description: Dive into the excitement of Mexico City, a fascinating capital where pre-Columbian history, colonial architecture and contemporary dynamism blend together. Between its historic neighborhoods, renowned museums and world heritage gastronomy, this vibrant metropolis offers a captivating immersion in Mexican culture. Discover our guide to the must-sees, culinary delights and practical advice for navigating this multifaceted megacity.

dishes.name: Tacos al Pastor - Marinated meat tacos
Chiles en Nogada - Stuffed peppers with walnut sauce
Tamales - Corn dough parcels with fillings

to-know.language: Spanish, limited English outside tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 18°C and 26°C, temperate high-altitude climate with rainy season (May-October)
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Metrobús (5-7 MXN per trip)

tips.payment: Cash recommended for small businesses, credit cards accepted in tourist establishments

sao-paulo.name: São Paulo
sao-paulo.title: São Paulo, Brazil's effervescent megalopolis
sao-paulo.description: Discover São Paulo, Latin America's largest city, where towering skyscrapers and historic neighborhoods coexist in an incomparable energy. The economic and cultural center of Brazil, this cosmopolitan metropolis will seduce you with its architectural diversity, exceptional food scene and legendary nightlife. Our guide reveals the iconic places, essential flavors and practical tips for navigating this fascinating urban jungle.

dishes.name: Feijoada - Black bean and meat stew
Pão de Queijo - Cheese bread rolls

to-know.language: Portuguese, limited English outside tourist and business areas
to-know.weather: Between 16°C and 28°C, subtropical climate with rainy summer (December-March)
to-know.airport: Guarulhos International Airport (GRU) and Congonhas Airport (CGH)
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi (4-5 BRL per metro trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most establishments, cash for small businesses

phuket.name: Phuket
phuket.title: Phuket, the tropical jewel of the Andaman Sea
phuket.description: Discover Phuket, Thailand's largest island, where white sandy beaches, crystal-clear waters and vibrant local culture blend together. Between its majestic temples, breathtaking landscapes and renowned gastronomy, this tropical paradise offers a perfect balance between beach relaxation and exotic adventures. Our guide reveals the must-see sites, culinary delights and all the practical advice to fully enjoy your stay in this idyllic corner of Thailand.

dishes.name: Shrimp Pad Thai - Thai stir-fried noodles
Tom Yum Goong - Spicy shrimp soup
Mango Sticky Rice - Sweet coconut rice with fresh mango

to-know.language: Thai, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 32°C year-round, tropical climate with rainy season (May-October)
to-know.transport: Tuk-tuk / Motorbike taxi / Songthaew (100-400 THB depending on distance)

tips.payment: Cash preferred, credit cards accepted in tourist establishments
tips.meal-hours: Restaurants serve all day, abundant street food

budapest.name: Budapest
budapest.title: Budapest, the pearl of the Danube with a thousand facets
budapest.description: Immerse yourself in the captivating world of Budapest, a city of incomparable charm where the Danube majestically separates the hills of Buda from the plains of Pest. Between its neo-Gothic architecture, century-old thermal baths and bohemian atmosphere, the Hungarian capital offers you a journey through time and cultures. Our guide reveals the must-see sites, gastronomic specialties and all the practical advice to explore this metropolis with exceptional heritage.

to-know.language: Hungarian, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 18°C and 28°C in summer, continental climate with 4 distinct seasons
to-know.transport: Metro / Tram / Bus (350-450 HUF per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in most establishments, cash needed for small businesses

honolulu.name: Honolulu
honolulu.title: Honolulu, tropical paradise between ocean and volcanoes
honolulu.description: Discover Honolulu, Hawaii's capital where the relaxed atmosphere of the Pacific islands meets American dynamism. Between its iconic beaches, volcanic mountains and rich cultural diversity, this tropical metropolis will seduce you with its unique ambiance blending Polynesian, Asian and Western influences. Our guide reveals the emblematic sites, local flavors and all the practical advice to fully enjoy your stay in this corner of paradise.

dishes.name: Poke Bowl - Hawaiian raw fish salad
Loco Moco - Traditional dish with rice, hamburger patty and egg

to-know.language: English, Hawaiian (official but not widely spoken)
to-know.weather: Between 24°C and 31°C year-round, tropical climate with wetter season (November-March)
to-know.transport: TheBus / Waikiki Trolley / Taxi (2.75-3.50 USD per bus ride)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted everywhere, tipping expected (15-20%)

beijing.name: Beijing
beijing.title: Beijing, millennial capital between tradition and modernity
beijing.description: Explore Beijing, a fascinating crossroads where imperial history and contemporary China meet in a unique urban symphony. Between its ancestral palaces, authentic hutongs and futuristic skyscrapers, the Chinese capital invites you on an extraordinary journey through the ages. Our guide presents the emblematic sites, culinary delights and all the essential information to discover this captivating metropolis where thousand-year-old traditions and modern ambitions coexist harmoniously.

top-places.name: Great Wall of China (Mutianyu or Badaling)

dishes.name: Zhajiangmian Noodles - Noodles with fermented bean sauce

to-know.language: Mandarin, limited English outside tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C in summer, -5°C and 5°C in winter, strongly continental climate
to-know.airport: Beijing Capital International Airport (PEK) and Beijing Daxing International Airport (PKX)
to-know.transport: Subway / Bus / Taxi (2-8 CNY per subway trip)

tips.payment: Cash and mobile payment (WeChat Pay, Alipay) preferred, limited international cards
tips.internet: VPN recommended to access Western websites

seville.name: Seville
seville.title: Seville, Andalusian jewel with orange blossom scents
seville.description: Let yourself be enchanted by Seville, the Andalusian capital where Moorish heritage meets Spanish passion in a dreamlike setting. Between its sumptuous palaces, shaded squares and streets perfumed with orange blossoms, this sunny city will seduce you with its artistic elegance and contagious joie de vivre. Our guide reveals the must-see treasures, gastronomic delights and all the practical advice to fully savor this pearl of southern Spain.

dishes.name: Churros con chocolate - Fried dough pastries with hot chocolate

to-know.language: Spanish, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 40°C in summer (very hot), 10°C and 20°C in winter, dry Mediterranean climate
to-know.transport: Bus / Tram / Metro (1.40€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, keep cash for small businesses

doha.name: Doha
doha.title: Doha, futuristic pearl between desert and Persian Gulf
doha.description: Discover Doha, a capital in full metamorphosis where ancestral traditions and avant-garde architecture create a striking contrast. Between its authentic souks, world-class museums and spectacular skyscrapers, this Gulf metropolis offers you a unique journey through time and cultures. Our guide reveals the key attractions, local flavors and all the practical advice to explore this Middle Eastern jewel where luxury and Bedouin hospitality meet harmoniously.

top-places.name: Desert Safari & Inland Sea (Khor Al Adaid)

dishes.name: Machboos - Spiced rice with meat or seafood

to-know.language: Arabic, English widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 45°C in summer (very hot), 15°C and 25°C in winter, desert climate
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi / Uber (2-10 QAR per metro trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, keep cash for souks
tips.dress-code: Respectful attire recommended, cover shoulders and knees

abu-dhabi.name: Abu Dhabi
abu-dhabi.title: Abu Dhabi, luxury oasis between tradition and futurism
abu-dhabi.description: Explore Abu Dhabi, capital of the United Arab Emirates, where architectural splendor and Bedouin heritage intertwine in a desert setting bordered by the turquoise waters of the Persian Gulf. Between its majestic mosques, avant-garde museums and sumptuous hotel complexes, this metropolis of the future invites you to an experience where refinement meets tradition with elegance. Our guide reveals the iconic sites, culinary specialties and all the practical advice to discover this pearl of the Middle East.

dishes.name: Luqaimat - Sweet dumplings with date syrup
Majboos - Spiced rice with meat and vegetables

to-know.language: Arabic, English widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 45°C in summer (very hot), 15°C and 30°C in winter, desert climate
to-know.transport: Bus / Taxi / Rental Car (2 AED per bus trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted almost everywhere, keep cash for small businesses
tips.dress-code: Respectful attire recommended, cover shoulders and knees in religious places

antalya.name: Antalya
antalya.title: Antalya, jewel of the Turkish Riviera between sea and mountains
antalya.description: Discover Antalya, pearl of the Turkish Mediterranean coast, where millennial history blends harmoniously with seaside pleasures in a breathtaking natural setting. Between its picturesque historic center, fine sandy beaches and ancient ruins, this destination will seduce you with its diversity and authenticity. Our guide presents the must-see sites, culinary delights and all the practical advice to fully enjoy this region where the Taurus mountains majestically plunge into the turquoise waters of the Mediterranean.

dishes.name: Antalya Piyaz - White bean salad with tahini
Lamb Kebap (Şiş Kebap) - Grilled meat skewers
Turkish Dondurma - Traditional stretchy ice cream

to-know.language: Turkish, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 35°C in summer, 10°C and 15°C in winter, Mediterranean climate
to-know.transport: Tram / Bus / Dolmuş (shared minibuses) (5-15 TRY per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in tourist establishments, cash useful for small businesses
tips.bargaining: Bargaining expected in bazaars and markets

edinburgh.name: Edinburgh
edinburgh.title: Edinburgh, Scottish capital between history and legends
edinburgh.description: Immerse yourself in the captivating atmosphere of Edinburgh, a city where medieval history and Scottish culture intertwine in a spectacular natural setting. Between its cobbled streets, majestic castles and verdant hills, this city will transport you to a universe where Celtic traditions and modernity coexist harmoniously. Our guide reveals the iconic sites, culinary specialties and all the practical advice to explore this fascinating metropolis where every stone tells a story.

to-know.language: English, Scottish Gaelic (minority)
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 19°C in summer, 1°C and 7°C in winter, often windy and rainy
to-know.transport: Bus / Tram / Taxi (1.80-4 GBP per bus journey)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted almost everywhere
tips.festivals: Edinburgh Festival in August, book well in advance

cancun.name: Cancún
cancun.title: Cancún, Caribbean paradise between dream beaches and Mayan treasures
cancun.description: Discover Cancún, jewel of the Riviera Maya where white sandy beaches bathed in turquoise waters meet the fascinating heritage of the Mayan civilization. Between its luxurious hotel complexes, millennial archaeological sites and natural wonders, this destination offers a perfect balance between beach relaxation and cultural adventures. Our guide reveals the iconic places, local flavors and all the practical advice to fully enjoy this corner of Mexican paradise.

dishes.name: Tacos al Pastor - Marinated meat tacos
Mole Poblano - Chocolate and chili sauce

to-know.language: Spanish, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 33°C year-round, tropical climate with rainy season (May-October)
to-know.transport: Bus / Taxi / Car Rental (12-25 MXN per bus trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in tourist areas, cash for small businesses
tips.sargassum: Check on sargassum seaweed conditions depending on the season

porto.name: Porto
porto.title: Porto, baroque city with timeless charm on the Douro
porto.description: Let yourself be seduced by Porto, Portugal's second city where the authentic Lusitanian soul reveals itself at every street corner. Between its colorful facades in azulejos, steep alleys and majestic river, this UNESCO World Heritage city invites you on a fascinating journey between tradition and modernity. Our guide reveals the architectural treasures, gastronomic delights and all the practical advice to explore this pearl of northern Portugal, birthplace of the famous wine that bears its name.

dishes.name: Bacalhau à Gomes de Sá - Porto-style codfish

to-know.language: Portuguese but English is understood in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 25°C in summer, 5°C and 15°C in winter, oceanic climate with Mediterranean influence
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Tram / Funicular (1.30-3.50€ per trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards widely accepted, keep cash for small businesses
tips.terrain: Very hilly city, wear comfortable walking shoes

buenos-aires.name: Buenos Aires
buenos-aires.title: Buenos Aires, passionate capital where tango and culture intertwine
buenos-aires.description: Dive into the effervescence of Buenos Aires, an elegant metropolis where the Latin soul expresses itself at every street corner. Between its emblematic neighborhoods with European architecture, historic squares and dynamic cultural scene, the Argentine capital will seduce you with its unique atmosphere blending tradition and modernity. Our guide reveals the must-see places, gastronomic specialties and all the practical advice to explore this fascinating city where the passion for tango sets the rhythm of daily life.

dishes.name: Empanadas - Stuffed pastries with meat or cheese
Dulce de Leche - Caramelized milk spread

to-know.language: Spanish, limited English outside tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 28°C and 35°C in summer (December-March), 8°C and 16°C in winter (June-September)
to-know.airport: Ezeiza International Airport (EZE) and Jorge Newbery Airport (AEP)
to-know.transport: Subway (Subte) / Bus (Colectivo) / Taxi (100-300 ARS per subway trip)

tips.payment: Cash preferred, banking system sometimes problematic for foreigners
tips.tango: Many shows and milongas (dance halls) open to beginners

rio-de-janeiro.name: Rio de Janeiro
rio-de-janeiro.title: Rio de Janeiro, the marvelous city between mountains and ocean
rio-de-janeiro.description: Succumb to the charm of Rio de Janeiro, a fascinating metropolis where exuberant nature and vibrant culture meet in a breathtaking setting. Between its mythical beaches, verdant mountains and festive atmosphere, the 'Cidade Maravilhosa' will enchant you with its spectacular beauty and legendary joie de vivre. Our guide reveals the iconic sites, local flavors and all the practical advice to explore this unique city where tropical forest embraces the ocean to the rhythm of samba.

dishes.name: Feijoada - Black bean and meat stew
Pão de Queijo - Cheese bread rolls

to-know.language: Portuguese, limited English outside tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 35°C in summer (December-March), 18°C and 27°C in winter (June-September), tropical climate
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi / VLT (tram) (4-5 BRL per metro trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in tourist areas, cash for small businesses
tips.safety: Stay vigilant and avoid sensitive neighborhoods, especially at night

hanoi.name: Hanoi
hanoi.title: Hanoi, millennial capital with authentic Asian charm
hanoi.description: Discover Hanoi, the historical and cultural heart of Vietnam, where centuries-old traditions and contemporary dynamism blend harmoniously. Between its peaceful lakes, bustling alleys and venerable temples, this capital invites you on a fascinating journey through the Vietnamese soul. Our guide reveals the iconic sites, culinary delights and all the practical advice to explore this captivating metropolis where French colonial heritage meets Chinese influences and Asian identity.

dishes.name: Pho - Beef or chicken noodle soup
Chả Cá Lã Vọng - Grilled fish with herbs

to-know.language: Vietnamese, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 20°C in winter, 30°C and 35°C in summer, humid subtropical with 4 distinct seasons
to-know.transport: Bus / Taxi / Motorbike taxi / Grabbike (10,000-20,000 VND per bus trip)

tips.payment: Cash preferred, credit cards accepted in tourist establishments
tips.traffic: Chaotic traffic, cross roads gradually and at a steady pace

lima.name: Lima
lima.title: Lima, gastronomic capital between Pacific and desert
lima.description: Explore Lima, a fascinating metropolis where colonial heritage, cosmopolitan modernity and pre-Columbian treasures blend in a setting between ocean and desert. Through its contrasting neighborhoods, millennial archaeological sites and world-renowned gastronomy, the Peruvian capital invites you to discover the cultural richness of this Andean country. Our guide presents the iconic places, culinary delights and all the practical advice to appreciate this city with multiple faces, cradle of contemporary Peruvian cuisine.

top-places.name: Park of the Reserve & Magic Water Circuit

dishes.name: Lomo Saltado - Stir-fried beef with vegetables
Pisco Sour - National cocktail with pisco

to-know.language: Spanish, Quechua (official languages), limited English in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 15°C and 27°C, coastal desert climate with foggy winter (May-October) and sunny summer (November-April)
to-know.transport: Bus / Taxi / Metropolitano (BRT system) (2-5 PEN per bus trip)

tips.payment: Credit cards accepted in tourist areas, cash for markets and small businesses
tips.altitude: Little risk of altitude sickness in Lima (unlike Cusco)

marrakech.name: Marrakech
marrakech.title: Marrakech, the ochre city of a thousand and one flavors
marrakech.description: Let yourself be enchanted by Marrakech, an imperial city where colors, scents and sounds transport you to an intoxicating universe. Between its labyrinthine souks, sumptuous palaces and lush gardens, the Pearl of the South offers you a unique sensory experience where ancestral traditions and refinement meet. Our guide reveals the treasures of this thousand-year-old city, its culinary specialties and all the practical information to discover this fascinating destination at the gateway to the desert.

dishes.name: Tagine - Traditional stew cooked in a clay pot
Couscous - Wheat semolina with vegetables and meats
Pastilla - Sweet and savory pie with chicken or pigeon

to-know.language: Arabic, Berber, French widely spoken
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 40°C in summer, 5°C and 20°C in winter, semi-arid climate
to-know.transport: Petit taxi / Bus / Horse-drawn carriage (7-20 MAD per petit taxi trip)

tips.payment: Cash preferred, credit cards accepted in tourist establishments
tips.bargaining: Bargaining essential in souks (start at 30-40% of the announced price)

punta-cana.name: Punta Cana
punta-cana.title: Punta Cana, tropical paradise with white sand beaches
punta-cana.description: Discover Punta Cana, the quintessential beach destination where the turquoise waters of the Caribbean caress immaculate beaches lined with coconut trees. Between its luxurious hotel complexes, preserved natural reserves and varied water activities, this Dominican jewel promises idyllic vacations under the tropical sun. Our guide reveals the most beautiful sites, local flavors and all the practical information to fully enjoy this corner of paradise where relaxation and adventure await you.

dishes.name: Pina Colada - Rum, pineapple and coconut cocktail

to-know.language: Spanish, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 25°C and 32°C year-round, tropical climate with rainy season (May-November)
to-know.transport: Taxi / Bus / Organized tours (300-800 DOP per taxi trip)

tips.payment: US dollar and credit cards accepted in tourist areas
tips.meal-hours: Lunch 12pm-3pm, Dinner 6pm-10pm, all-inclusive meal plans in most hotels
tips.all-inclusive: Most stays are all-inclusive packages at resorts

santiago.name: Santiago de los Caballeros
santiago.title: Santiago, cultural jewel in the heart of the Cibao Valley
santiago.description: Discover Santiago de los Caballeros, the second largest city in the Dominican Republic, where Caribbean authenticity reveals itself far from the tourist beaches. Between its historical monuments, cultural centers and lively atmosphere, this metropolis offers you an immersion in authentic Dominican life. Our guide presents the emblematic sites, gastronomic delights and all the practical advice to explore this dynamic city nestled in the heart of the fertile Cibao Valley, cradle of the country's culture and traditions.

top-places.name: Monument to the Heroes of the Restoration

dishes.name: Habichuelas con Dulce - Sweet bean dessert

to-know.language: Spanish, limited English outside tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 22°C and 32°C year-round, tropical climate with rainy season (May-November)
to-know.transport: Taxi / Carros públicos (shared taxis) / Moto-taxi (50-300 DOP per trip)

tips.payment: Cash preferred, credit cards accepted in larger establishments
tips.safety: Avoid peripheral neighborhoods at night, use taxis recommended by your hotel

cairo.name: Cairo
cairo.title: Cairo, millennial metropolis on the banks of the Nile
cairo.description: Dive into the effervescence of Cairo, a fascinating crossroads where ancient Egypt meets the modern Arab world in captivating organized chaos. Between its pharaonic treasures, majestic mosques and lively popular neighborhoods, Africa's largest city takes you on a journey through the millennia. Our guide reveals the must-see sites, authentic flavors and all the essential information to explore this exciting metropolis where Egypt's glorious past meets the present with intensity.

dishes.name: Koshari - National dish of pasta, rice and lentils
Foul Medames - Traditional fava bean purée
Mahshi - Vegetables stuffed with spiced rice

to-know.language: Arabic, English spoken in tourist areas
to-know.weather: Between 20°C and 35°C in summer, 10°C and 20°C in winter, desert climate with little rainfall
to-know.transport: Metro / Bus / Taxi / Uber (3-10 EGP per metro trip)

tips.payment: Cash recommended, credit cards accepted in large establishments
tips.bargaining: Bargaining expected in markets and for taxis (divide initial price by 2 or 3)
